TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mizuhu, title = Mizuhu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mizuhu} }

S.FORM: Mizuhu Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Mizuhu a niyaro', 99 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 286 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 271 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 15 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 90%, Tayal 1%, Amis 1%, Hla'alua 1%, Paiwan 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: mi*o~u~uńßo~u~u itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u kao~uńßsio~u~uŇč ko~u mi*o~u~uńßo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, taja…ĺ *%, amis *%, ńß…ĺa °a…ĺo~u~ua *%, paiwan *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Mizuhu Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Mizuhu a niyaro', 99 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 286 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 271 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 15 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 90%, Tayal 1%, Amis 1%, Hla'alua 1%, Paiwan 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: mi*o~u~uńßo~u~u itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u kao~uńßsio~u~uŇč ko~u mi*o~u~uńßo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, taja…ĺ *%, amis *%, ńß…ĺa °a…ĺo~u~ua *%, paiwan *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
